documentation.content: One admin account read more than 30 applicant records in 10 minutes (security item D). Normal officer review stays well below this. Investigate: identify the admin_id in the metric labels, confirm the login was expected. If the account is compromised or the access is illegitimate, disable that PartnerAdmin and rotate its credentials. Metric: logging.googleapis.com/user/applicant_record_reads. Source line: AdminApplicationDetailView 'AUDIT applicant_detail_read'.

conditions.displayName: admin reads > 30 applicant records in 10 min
